name: WebDevLab_GameTracker
description: This project was generated using [Angular CLI](https://github.com/angular/angular-cli) version 21.0.0.

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "blue,magenta" "cd backend && npm run start:dev" "cd frontend && ng serve"
scripts.test: npm run reset-db && concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "blue,magenta" "cd backend && npm run test -- --coverage --coverageReporters=text-summary" "cd frontend && ng test --coverage"
